title: eupatorium filifolium var. genuina
intro: Eupatorium filifolium var. genuina, also known as Small White Snakeroot, is a plant species belonging to the Eupatorium genus and Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is often used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Eupatorium filifolium var. genuina include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
